simple_types.name: Kind
simple_types.code:
type Kind is (Not_Initialized,
              No_Current_Context,
              Invalid_Enum,
              Invalid_Value,
              Out_Of_Memory,
              API_Unavailable,
              Version_Unavailable,
              Platform_Error,
              Format_Unavailable);

access_types.name: Callback
access_types.code: type Callback is access procedure (Error : Kind; Description : String);
